self_improvement.summary: Cycle 11: Confirmed workload-budget ceiling as primary autonomous constraint after billing-block recovery matured and file-first architecture validated. Auto-improvement pathway defined: archive old memory, selective corrections, tiered analysis frequency. Diagnostics subagent completed successfully. No new corrections. P0 blockades persist (EVEZ Studio split-brain >18h, payment disconnected >23h, revenue $0). Pattern: External dependency failures remain human-action buckets; internal optimization is active autonomous frontier. Free-tier monitoring viable but budget-constrained.
